name: Ezdan Holding Group Q.P.S.C.
summary: Ezdan Holding Group Q.P.S.C., together with its subsidiaries, manages and rents real estate properties in Qatar. It operates through four segments: Residential and Commercial Properties, Investments, Hotel and Suites, and Malls. The Residential and Commercial Properties segment develops, owns, and rents real estate properties. The Investments segment invests in shares and sukuk investments. The Hotel and Suites segment manages hotels, suites, and restaurants. The Mall segment manages shopping malls. The company was formerly known as Ezdan Real Estate Company Q.S.C. and changed its name to Ezdan Holding Group Q.P.S.C. Ezdan Holding Group Q.P.S.C. was founded in 1960 and is based in Doha, Qatar.
